heading: “Nuclear explosive device” defined
label: 2799aa–2 “Nuclear explosive device” defined
text: As used in this subchapter, the term “nuclear explosive device” has the meaning given that term in .section 6305(4) of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective 60 days after , see , set out as a note under .Apr. 30, 1994section 831 of Pub. L. 103–236section 6301 of this title
